title: StartupLive'26 ViennaUP
location: HOIV - Home of Innovation, Arsenalstrasse 11, 1030, Vienna
descriptionFull:
Two Days. Limitless Potential. One Transformational Experience.

Join StartupLive’26 ViennaUP and immerse yourself in two days of innovation, collaboration, and competition within Vienna’s dynamic startup ecosystem.

Whether you’re a founder with a bold idea or a professional in tech, design, marketing, or business, this is your opportunity to build something meaningful alongside ambitious creators and experienced mentors.

Day 1 focuses on connection and creation. Founders deliver fast-paced 90-second pitches, followed by focused workshops and mentoring to refine business models, sharpen strategy, and strengthen startups.

Day 2 focuses on refinement and performance, with pitch training and financing workshops, followed by live competition in front of investors and corporate leaders.

Professionals (attendees) are invited to contribute their skills and co-create with early-stage founders. Startups gain direct access to mentors, investors, and Vienna’s startup ecosystem.

Visitors are welcome to join the final pitch event and experience the future of entrepreneurship live.

title: Europe Tech Hackathon
location: ÖBB Open Innovation Factory, Foyer 1 Ecke, Lassallestraße, Joseph-Roth-Gasse 5, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
The Europe Tech Hackathon is an intensive, hands-on innovation experience for people who want to turn ideas into real impact. In Vienna, interdisciplinary teams work on concrete sustainability challenges using technology, AI and data.

Throughout the hackathon, participants benefit from experienced mentors from tech, business and sustainability who actively support teams in sharpening ideas, validating assumptions and building functional prototypes. The results are presented to a professional jury of industry and innovation experts, who provide honest, constructive feedback focused on impact, feasibility and scalability.

More than a competition, the Europe Tech Hackathon is a unique experience: intense collaboration, rapid learning, strong community spirit and the energy of creating something meaningful together. Join if you want to build, learn and connect.

title: Impact Days
location: Rathaus Wien (City Hall Vienna), Friedrich-Schmidt-Platz 1, 1010, Vienna
descriptionFull:
This year, Impact Days invites a different way of engaging with the future. Not by predicting it, simplifying it, or choosing sides, but by shaping it consciously, within the real limits that define our time.

’Holding Tensions, Creating Impact’ is the guiding idea for Impact Days ’26.
As economic, ecological, technological, and social systems become increasingly intertwined, progress no longer comes from easy answers or single solutions. Impact Days ’26 is built around three core tensions shaping the impact economy today: Nature and Technology, Stability and Change, and Value Extraction and Regeneration. These are not problems to be solved, but relationships to be held, navigated, and designed with care.

Impact Days ’26 is a space for learning how to work in this complexity. It is about making trade-offs visible, holding opposing forces in relationships, and shaping futures that can endure within social and planetary limits. The conference brings together entrepreneurs, investors, leaders, and system builders who are ready to engage with responsibility rather than certainty.

title: Fundraising Secrets - The Complete Masterplan for Winning Investors and Building Lasting Relationships
location: Near Vienna Central Station (Hauptbahnhof) / Südtiroler Platz (exact address will be shared after booking)
descriptionFull:
Stop chasing buzzwords and start building real investor connections. I’ve been in your shoes—navigating the high-stakes world of VCs and Angels to secure 3 funding rounds across Austria, Germany, and the USA. Fundraising Secrets isn’t a theoretical lecture; it’s a deep dive into the reality of startup investment, based on my personal, battle-tested roadmap.

I’m Florian Kandler, and in this interactive workshop, we’re going “Beyond the Hype” to strip away the glossy myths. I’ll show you how to determine if an investor is actually the right match and how to engage in eye-level conversations built on credibility, not jargon. Whether you are a local founder or joining us from abroad, you’ll gain a universal blueprint to navigate your journey with confidence.

Don’t just hope for a check — learn how to foster lasting partnerships. You’ll leave with actionable techniques you can apply immediately at ViennaUP to turn your vision into a funded reality. Let’s get to work.

title: Startup World Cup Austria 2026
companyName: invest.austria - Austrian association for private capital
descriptionFull:
The Startup World Cup, hosted by Pegasus Tech Ventures, is the largest startup competition worldwide, with more than 70 countries taking part every year. In 2021, the Austrian Angel Investors Association (now: invest.austria) and Austrian Startups brought the competition to Austria for the first time.

After a series of regional pre events across Austria, the winning startups compete on the final stage in Vienna, pitching for the chance to represent Austria at the global Startup World Cup Finals in Silicon Valley.

The finale programme features a fireside chat with international ecosystem leaders, followed by the final pitch competition, where selected startups present their vision in front of a high level jury of industry experts and investors. Each pitch is evaluated based on idea, market relevance, traction, competitive advantage, team and overall pitch performance.

title: ViennaUP 2026 Opening Night
location: The Vienna City Hall, Friedrich-Schmidt-Platz 1, 1010, Vienna
descriptionFull:
ViennaUP 2026 returns in style: get ready to kick off a week of bold ideas in one of the city's most magical locations.

For this year's Opening Night, the Vienna Business Agency brings together founders, investors, and ecosystem representatives from around the world in none other than the Vienna City Hall, a place that best captures what the festival is all about: big ambition rooted in a history of innovation.

Beneath the light of the chandeliers, in a place that has shaped European culture, we will start forward-thinking conversations that will carry throughout the entire week as we make connections, build networks, and grow our businesses. The event is hosted by the Vienna Business Agency, which initiates and curates ViennaUP, our decentralised, community-driven festival brought to life year after year in partnership with local and international ecosystem players. 

The evening combines inspiration, substance, and a touch of surprise, including a special keynote by Fredrik Debong, serial entrepreneur and founder of mySugr, a Viennese buffet, and much more.

Expect exciting encounters and fresh perspectives, all against a breathtaking backdrop. See you in Vienna!

title: "Do it right" Basics for company founding in Vienna
location: Wirtschaftskammer Wien, Straße der Wiener Wirtschaft 1, 1020 Vienna, EG (ground floor), Saal 5
descriptionFull:
This workshop provides a practical guide for founders and startups, covering everything you need to know before, during, and after starting your business with a trade license. Topics include:

Before founding: choosing the right legal form, understanding types of trades (free vs. regulated), planning finances, and exploring funding opportunities (e.g., NeuFöG)

During founding: registering your trade license in Vienna, entering the commercial register, and setting up commercial social insurance

After founding: understanding taxes, managing ongoing compliance, and navigating social insurance (including part-time self-employment)

After the seminar, participants will have the opportunity to connect with experts in these areas to ask questions and get practical advice tailored to their business.

title: From Pitch to Patient: How Digital Health and AI actually make it into Practice
descriptionFull:
There are plenty of new HealthTech ideas – and some actually have the potential to change the healthcare system! At this meetup we will bring startups and professionals from hospitals, care facilities, and medical practices together and focus on real problems in healthcare, concrete solutions, and an honest look at what works in practice. Beyond individual improvements, we explore how technological innovation has the potential to fundamentally transform healthcare systems, making them more efficient, accessible, and patient-centered.

Through short keynotes, startup pitches, use cases and interactive discussions, we show how innovations can be designed to ease workflows, benefit patients, and integrate into existing structures.

Whether you're a founder, physician, nurse, manager, or IT professional – if you want to help ensure that innovation in healthcare doesn't get stuck in pitch decks but actually reaches patients and teams, driving systemic change in the process, you're in the right place.

title: HOIV Founder Huddle 2026: Pitch, Build & Scale
location: HOIV - Home of Innovation, Arsenalstraße 11, 1030 Vienna
descriptionFull:
HOIV Founder Huddle 2026 is a focused, consultation-driven session designed for a curated group of startup teams who are actively building and looking for meaningful strategic input. As part of ViennaUP, the session enables a space where founders can openly discuss real challenges and receive practical, experience-driven feedback.

This is not a traditional demo day or pitch competition. Instead, it is a structured working session that blends elements of a workshop, meet-the-expert format, and moderated group discussion.

Selected startups will join experienced operators, investors, VCs, banks, and industry experts in a structured working format.
- It is an open setting designed for real conversation.
- The focus is on real topics that founders face every day — from market positioning and product direction to fundraising preparation, operational bottlenecks, team dynamics, and scaling decisions.

title: Lab to Leader: Building Science Ventures That Last
location: TU in the Sky,  Getreidemarkt  9,  1060 Vienna
descriptionFull:
Future-Proof Cofounder Teams & Scaling-Ready Startups
Transform research into ventures built to scale. This full-day track tackles the make-or-break challenges every science startup faces: finding the right cofounder and scaling successfully. 

What to Expect

  • Cofounder Matching Pitches – A joint initiative by AIT, BOKU, MedUni Wien, TU Wien, Uni Wien, WU Wien & Xista, connecting local and international academic spinoffs with business cofounders through pitches and dedicated networking zones.

  • Panel: "Cofounder and Scaling Stories – Wins, Woes & Needs," moderated by Petra Wolkenstein, Konsultori.

  • Keynote: "Aligning for Success – Building Future-Proof Cofounder Teams," with Michael Kubiena, Konsultori.

  • Session: "How to Build a Dream Team: Why Interdisciplinarity is Key", New Venture Scouting.

For: Science entrepreneurs, aspiring cofounders, spinoffs in formation, pre-scaleups, and accelerator/entrepreneurship program managers.

Organised by: Konsultori & Vienna Spin-Off Project (AIT, BOKU, Medizinische Universität Wien, TU Wien, Universität Wien, WU Wien, Xista)
Sponsored by AWS.

title: The Recursive CEE Forum
descriptionFull:
The Recursive CEE Forum returns to ViennaUP to connect the innovation leaders in the CEE region and strengthen its role in building Europe’s tech future. Last year, 450 founders, investors, ecosystem builders, and policymakers came together, turning cross-border conversations into real connections.

In 2026, we build on that pace with a sharper focus on outcomes: interactive formats, data-driven insights on the region’s innovation performance, and curated opportunities for founders and investors to connect with intent. The forum creates a stronger bridge between CEE and DACH, enabling collaboration across startups, capital, institutions, and technology leaders. Discussions will cover market expansion, capital efficiency, founder tenacity, strategic technologies, and the regulatory landscape shaping innovation across Europe.

Join The Recursive CEE Forum at ViennaUP 2026 and be part of the conversation driving the region forward, forging partnerships, enabling smarter decisions, and increasing international visibility.

title: WSA Global Congress
descriptionFull:
WSA Global Congress – Scaling Digital Solutions. For People & Planet.

Meet the people behind the world’s most impactful digital solutions at the WSA Global Congress in Vienna.

Connect with social entrepreneurs, innovators, policymakers, investors, and ecosystem builders working to scale digital solutions with social impact globally.

Interactive morning sessions let you exchange ideas and gain practical insights on ethical AI, digital sovereignty, and how to successfully scale tech solutions that address real societal and environmental challenges.

In the afternoon, experience the live pitches of the WSA Winners 2025, presenting digital impact solutions from around the world, offering inspiration, partnership opportunities, and real-world use cases for impact at scale.

Join this truly global, multi-stakeholder community and leave with new connections, optimistic perspectives, and concrete ideas to grow your own impact.

Don't forget to check out WSA Community Day, too!

title: Creative Days Vienna 2026
descriptionFull:
How are digital technologies shaping the future of cultural experiences? On 20 and 21 May 2026, Creative Days Vienna will once again bring together leading international creative professionals for a diverse program of talks, tours, performances, installations and networking formats.

The participants of Creative Days Vienna 2026 will provide substantial impulses for architecture, design, film, gaming, fashion, music and the visual arts. Together, we will discuss the interplay between technological innovations, social change and the creative industries.

Creative Days Vienna 2026 will open with an (Un)Conference exploring how creatives can reshape cultural and digital infrastructures. descriptionFull:

Last year was just the warm-up. If you thought we went hard before, you haven't seen anything yet. We’re back at ViennaUP to tear down the wall of perfect entrepreneurship and show you the fuckups, blood, sweat, and bad decisions hidden behind the greatest wins.

Come join us, coz this is where the coolest crowd of the entire ViennaUP week gathers to ditch the masks and get real.

Fail loud. Fail proud. Burn the rulebook.

descriptionFull:
Onco:Innovate returns to Vienna for its second flagship edition.

The format is a multidisciplinary conference at the crossroads of a high-level oncology symposium and a dynamic startup & innovation summit. Onco:Innovate highlights emerging trends and groundbreaking solutions in oncology, addresses barriers to market entry, and fosters impactful partnerships in the fight against cancer. We unite leading experts from across the international oncology ecosystem, including startups & scaleups, hospitals & clinics, pharma & corporates, patient organizations, policymakers, payers, NGOs, and investors. From medical breakthroughs and precision therapies to AI-driven solutions, funding models, regulatory strategies, and project consortia, Onco:Innovate elevates the different perspectives to improve access, quality of life, and outcomes. This is where collaboration transforms innovation into better cancer care. Join us and help shape the future of oncology.

descriptionFull:
WSA Global Congress – Scaling Digital Solutions. For People & Planet.

Meet the people behind the world’s most impactful digital solutions at the WSA Global Congress in Vienna.

Connect with social entrepreneurs, innovators, policymakers, investors, and ecosystem builders working to scale digital solutions with social impact globally.

Interactive morning sessions let you exchange ideas and gain practical insights on ethical AI, digital sovereignty, and how to successfully scale tech solutions that address real societal and environmental challenges.

In the afternoon, experience the live pitches of the WSA Winners 2025, presenting digital impact solutions from around the world, offering inspiration, partnership opportunities, and real-world use cases for impact at scale.

Digitalization is more than a buzzword—it is a catalyst for a circular urban economy. At the Smart City SuMMit 2026, we are moving beyond theory to focus on digital solutions for circular cities that work. Our mission is to bridge the gap between high-level strategy and real-world implementation by connecting impactful innovators with bold industry leaders.

  • High-Speed Impact: We skip the small talk. Our curated kick-off ensures you meet relevant partners in the very first slot.

  • Marketplace of Solutions: Discover around 15 hand-picked solution providers showcasing digital solutions for the circular economy.
  • Funding : Gain insights from funding agency experts on funding and scaling circular solutions in Vienna.

Who Should Join?

We invite business leaders, industry experts, decision-makers, and entrepreneurs to discover market-ready solutions and initiate high-impact partnership

title: Manufacturing Day
descriptionFull:
The Manufacturing Day is the leading event for the manufacturing industry during ViennaUP. It brings together more than 500 startups, key industrial players, investors, researchers and experts from 40+ different countries. The event features startup and corporate pitching sessions, inspiring keynotes and discussions with renowned global speakers, matchmaking and networking opportunities, and showcases the latest innovations and technologies from European research. 

Manufacturing Day 2026 focuses on one of the most critical challenges for the global industrial economy: how to successfully scale manufacturing ventures into competitive, resilient and globally operating companies. Manufacturing innovation is thriving, yet many startups struggle to scale from pilot to global production. Manufacturing Day 2026 explores what enables successful industrial scale-up, examining investment models, policy frameworks and partnerships that turn innovation into impact.

descriptionFull:

title: International Blockchain Day: The New Money: Stablecoins, Crypto, CBDC and the Power of Tokenization
descriptionFull:
International Blockchain Day – The New Money

The global financial system is entering a new era. At International Blockchain Day, we explore how stablecoins, crypto assets, CBDCs and tokenization are redefining money, markets and value creation. From policy and infrastructure to real-world adoption, the event connects leaders from finance, technology, regulation and the real economy to shape what comes next.

Stream 1 – Global Developments and Lessons for Europe
Discover how international markets are evolving, what regulatory frameworks are emerging, and which global use cases Europe can learn from to stay competitive in digital finance.

Stream 2 – Stablecoins: Powering the Next Financial System
Stablecoins are becoming the backbone of on-chain finance. This stream dives into payments, settlement, compliance, infrastructure and the role of stablecoins in the future monetary system.

Stream 3 – Digital Assets as an Investment Class – The New Money in Motion
From tokenization to institutional adoption, explore how digital assets are transforming portfolios, capital markets and investment strategies.

title: Corporate Venturing Summit
descriptionFull:
REINVENT OR DECLINE - How can corporations transform and grow in challenging times?

We will kick off the Corporate Venturing Summit with a series of engaging fishbowl sessions designed to turn insight into action: Strategy & Setup (making smart choices about where to play and how to win), Reinvent & Transform (rewiring the core to stay relevant and competitive), and Build & Grow (creating new businesses that can succeed beyond the core).

In the evening, we’ll explore how to build a "Reinvention Engine" that leverages simplicity, AI, and new technologies as a core capability. We’ll then dive into a C-level discussion on moving from research to innovation to implementation - and what commonly goes wrong in corporate setups.

The day wraps up with networking over dinner and drinks.

title: ClawCon #3 - ViennaUP edition
location: Prisma by Lumia, Am Grünen Prater 2, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
For space lobsters, humans, and everything in between
The Claw is back and proud to be an official part of ViennaUP! Join us for a high-energy evening dedicated to the OpenClaw movement—the world’s fastest-growing open-source AI agent ecosystem. Whether you’re a builder, a hacker, or just "Claw-curious," this is the hub for the new Agent Economy.
What’s on the Agenda?

  • Lightning Talks @ 5 Mins: No boring PowerPoints. Just raw, 5-minute demos of the coolest and weirdest use cases—from autonomous home setups to AI-driven "vibe coding" projects that run 24/7.
  • Community over Corporate: Experience the "lobster" atmosphere where technical fails are celebrated, and "how did you build that?" is the only question that matters.
  • Meet The New Agentic Hub: Hosted by Lumia, your dedicated space for the agent economy.

Don’t miss the ViennaUP edition of the world's most creative AI meetup and take the chance to connect with the builders shaping the future of decentralized AI.

title: Founders & Future Founders Breakfast
descriptionFull:
Founders & Future Founders Breakfast
22 May | 09:00–12:00 | ViennaUP
Hosted by Calm/Storm x WU Ignite Ventures


A relaxed morning for the next generation of builders in Austria. Founders & Future Founders Breakfast brings together early-stage founders, operators, students, and ambitious minds who are either already building — or seriously thinking about it.


Hosted as part of ViennaUP by Calm/Storm and WU Ignite, this session is about honest conversations around going from 0 → 1. No pitch stage, no panels for show just practical insights, real experiences, and space to connect with others at a similar stage.

What to expect:

  • Short founder and investor insights on getting started
  • Practical perspectives on early traction, funding, and mistakes
  • Open Q&A and networking with peers
  • A room full of people who are building, or about to

WU Ignite Ventures backs founders at day zero. Calm/Storm invests early in ambitious teams building in digital health. Together, we want to create a space where ideas can turn into action.

title: Creative Catalyst Aperture
descriptionFull:
What does it take to bring a creative business to European scale?

Aperture is the launch of Creative Catalyst Austria, an innovation pathway programme for Austrian creative businesses moving beyond borders, designed to push creative businesses beyond local markets and into European scale, through tailored innovation and growth pathways.

The day traces the Creative Catalyst journey from provocation and foresight to hands-on collaboration. The morning is dedicated to talks from practitioners working at the intersection of materials and creative technology, perspectives that highlight emerging shifts shaping Europe's creative economy, and where creative businesses can position themselves within it.

In the afternoon, the focus turns to application. Participants take part in smaller sessions with members of the Creative Catalyst network: coaches, investors, and industry experts working directly with businesses on their next steps. Alongside these sessions, participants can also learn more about current opportunities from EIT Culture & Creativity and explore how to engage with upcoming programmes and funding calls.

title: Open House @AI Factory Austria AI:AT
descriptionFull:
Yes, we are open! The AI Factory Austria AI:AT opens the doors of its brand new Innovation Center and Coworking Space during ViennaUP for startups, scale-ups and innovation-driven companies, who want to experience practical, hands-on AI!

From 9:30 AM to 04:00 PM you can visit our space, talk to our consultants about our services or participate in one of our free workshops:

  • AI Opportunity Sprint (10:00 AM-11:30 AM) - Identify and prioritize real AI use cases for your startup, including impact/effort scoring and next steps.
  • Build Your First AI Agent (1:00 PM–2:30 PM) - Create a simple AI agent or automation workflow you can immediately test and use.
  • How to Trustworthy AI (3:00 PM–4:00 PM) - A clear, practical overview of EU AI Act, GDPR and ethical AI - no legal background required.

Join us where the future of AI lives! Registration for Open House and workshops is required.

❗️Please note: workshop is limited to 24 seats.

✨ As a small extra incentive, workshop participants will receive a surprise goodie bag ✨

title: WSA Community Day
location: Track 1: das forum, Operngasse 17-21/11. OG, 1040 Vienna; Track 2: Vienna Business Agency, Mariahilfer Straße 20, 1070 Vienna
descriptionFull:
On the final day of the WSA Global Congress, participants can dive deeper into the topics most relevant to their work. Two parallel tracks run simultaneously, so make sure to choose the ticket that best fits your interests and goals in the next step.

Track 1: Democracy in the Digital Age
This highly interactive morning in partnership with Urban Innovation Austria brings together international experts and entrepreneurs to discuss the challenges and opportunities of democracy in the digital era, exploring how digital solutions can strengthen democratic values while addressing threats such as misinformation, platform dominance, and digital dependency.

Track 2: Impact Founders Lab – Tools for Scaling Your Startup
Designed for impact entrepreneurs and tech startups, this hands-on workshop series hosted at the Vienna Business Agency provides practical tools to strengthen your business while staying true to your mission, focusing on real founder challenges.

Workshops include:

  • Impact That Pays Off: Measuring What Matters
  • Business Models for Mission-Driven Startups
  • Founder Resilience & Team Health
  • Play to Pivot: Creative Problem Solving for Founders

title: { founders only }
descriptionFull:
{ founders only } is not just another conference. It’s a space for 250 startup founders who’ve lived the rollercoaster of building something real.

No pitching. No sales. Zero fluff.

Only growth and scale founders who’ve raised or earned €500k+, coming together for honest conversations about the ups and downs of the founder journey.

Through panel talks with exited and experienced founders, hands-on workshops, and genuine peer connections, this { founders only } event creates a founder-to-founder experience like no other. Learn directly from your peers and gain practical tools and proven strategies to scale sustainably, building stronger businesses with lasting success.

Expect raw insights, shared struggles, and personal breakthroughs around mental health, responsible leadership, and wealth that’s more than numbers.

This is where Europe’s growth and scale founders meet eye to eye, a chance to step out of the hustle and reconnect with purpose, balance, and people who truly get it.
